proof: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { (x1 ∈ x0 and x2 ∈ x0 and x1 < x2 and x1 <= x3 and x3 <= x2 and not x3 ∈ x0) = disconnecting_triple(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(s, x, y, z)

goal: is_connected_real_set(s) = forall(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) }
proof: function(x0: Set[Real]) { forall(x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(x0, x1, x2, x3) } = is_connected_real_set(x0) }(s)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { x0 + T0.0 = x0 }[Real](z)
not is_connected_real_set(s) or forall(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) } = true
disconnecting_triple(s, x, y, z + Real.0)
is_connected_real_set(s) and x ∈ s and y ∈ s and x < y and x <= z
function(x0: Real) { not is_connected_real_set(s) or forall(x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) } = true }(x)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { not is_connected_real_set(s) or forall(x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) } = true }(x, y)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not is_connected_real_set(s) or not disconnecting_triple(s, x0, x1, x2) }(x, y, z + Real.0)

goal: disconnecting_triple(s.intersection(t), x, y, z) = (s.intersection(t).contains(x) and s.intersection(t).contains(y) and x < y and x <= z and z <= y and not s.intersection(t).contains(z))
proof: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { (x1 ∈ x0 and x2 ∈ x0 and x1 < x2 and x1 <= x3 and x3 <= x2 and not x3 ∈ x0) = disconnecting_triple(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(s ∩ t, x, y, z)
function(x0: Set[Real]) { forall(x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(x0, x1, x2, x3) } = is_connected_real_set(x0) }(s ∩ t)
let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Real, k1: Real) { disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, w0, k0, k1) } }
let w1: Real satisfy { exists(k2: Real) { disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, w0, w1, k2) } }
let w2: Real satisfy { disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, w0, w1, w2) }
let w3: Real satisfy { exists(k3: Real) { disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, w0, w3, k3) } }
let w4: Real satisfy { disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, w0, w3, w4) }
let w5: Real satisfy { disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, w0, w3, w5) }
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(s ∩ t, x0, x1, x2) or false = true }(w0, w3, w5)

goal: disconnecting_triple(Set.singleton(a), x, y, z) = (Set.singleton(a).contains(x) and Set.singleton(a).contains(y) and x < y and x <= z and z <= y and not Set.singleton(a).contains(z))
proof: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { (x1 ∈ x0 and x2 ∈ x0 and x1 < x2 and x1 <= x3 and x3 <= x2 and not x3 ∈ x0) = disconnecting_triple(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(Set.singleton(a), x, y, z)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.singleton[T0](x0) = (x0 = x1) }[Real](a, x)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.singleton[T0](x0) = (x0 = x1) }[Real](a, y)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 > x1 = x1 < x0 }[Real](y, x)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or x0 != x1 }[Real](y, x)
function(x0: Set[Real]) { forall(x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(x0, x1, x2, x3) } = is_connected_real_set(x0) }(Set.singleton(a))
let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Real, k1: Real) { disconnecting_triple(Set.singleton(a), w0, k0, k1) } }
let w1: Real satisfy { exists(k2: Real) { disconnecting_triple(Set.singleton(a), w0, w1, k2) } }
let w2: Real satisfy { disconnecting_triple(Set.singleton(a), w0, w1, w2) }
let w3: Real satisfy { exists(k3: Real) { disconnecting_triple(Set.singleton(a), w0, w3, k3) } }
let w4: Real satisfy { disconnecting_triple(Set.singleton(a), w0, w3, w4) }
let w5: Real satisfy { disconnecting_triple(Set.singleton(a), w0, w3, w5) }
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not disconnecting_triple(Set.singleton(a), x0, x1, x2) or false = true }(w0, w3, w5)
